# Tables Complex Fixture

## 基础表格

| Name | Age | City |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Alice | 30 | Beijing |
| Bob | 25 | Shanghai |

## 含对齐标记（左/中/右）

| Left | Center | Right |
| :--- | :---: | ---: |
| a | b | c |
| long text | middle | 999 |

## 含行内格式

| Feature | Syntax | Example |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Bold | `**x**` | **bold** |
| Italic | `*x*` | *italic* |
| Code | `` `x` `` | `code` |
| Link | `[t](u)` | [Google](https://google.com) |

## 含换行（两空格 GFM 语法）

| Scenario | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Line break | line1  line2 |
| Two breaks | a  b  c |

## 含空单元格

| A | B | C |
| --- | --- | --- |
| foo |  | bar |
|  | mid |  |
| x | y | z |
